Class DRXyBlockPlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.AbstractBasePlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRAxisPlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRXyBlockPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIAxisPlot, DRIBasePlot, DRIPlot, DRIXyBlockPlot, Serializable
public class DRXyBlockPlot extends DRAxisPlot implements DRIXyBlockPlot

Author:
